metadata.description: Azure region for all staging resources.
Logical environment name used for tagging and naming.
Whether to deploy the container apps or bootstrap only the shared infrastructure.
Whether to deploy private endpoints and private networking resources.
Container image tag for the API image stored in ACR.
Container image tag for the portal image stored in ACR.
Administrator username for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
Administrator password for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.
Optional tags to apply to all resources.

variables.serverProperties: [union(createObject('administratorLogin', parameters('administratorLogin'), 'administratorLoginPassword', parameters('administratorPassword'), 'version', parameters('serverVersion'), 'createMode', 'Create', 'backup', createObject('backupRetentionDays', parameters('backupRetentionDays'), 'geoRedundantBackup', 'Disabled'), 'highAvailability', createObject('mode', 'Disabled'), 'storage', createObject('storageSizeGB', parameters('storageSizeGb'), 'autoGrow', 'Enabled', 'tier', 'P4')), if(or(variables('isPublicMode'), empty(parameters('privateDnsZoneId'))), createObject(), createObject('network', createObject('delegatedSubnetResourceId', parameters('delegatedSubnetResourceId'), 'privateDnsZoneArmResourceId', parameters('privateDnsZoneId'), 'publicNetworkAccess', 'Disabled'))))]

resources.name: [parameters('name')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('appLogsConfiguration', createObject('destination', 'log-analytics', 'logAnalyticsConfiguration', createObject('customerId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName')), '2023-09-01').customerId, 'sharedKey', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName')), '2023-09-01').primarySharedKey))), if(empty(parameters('infrastructureSubnetId')), createObject(), createObject('vnetConfiguration', createObject('infrastructureSubnetId', parameters('infrastructureSubnetId'), 'internal', false()))))]
